name: Premium Chicken Kibble
description: High-protein dry food with essential vitamins for active dogs. Made with real chicken.

name: CloudSoft Orthopedic Pet Bed
description: Memory-foam bed that keeps joints comfortable for older pets. Water-resistant cover.

name: Interactive Treat Puzzle Toy
description: Keeps your pet mentally engaged while rewarding them with treats. Dishwasher safe.

name: No-Pull Dog Harness
description: Comfort-fit harness to make walks safer and easier. Adjustable straps for all breeds.

name: Grain-Free Salmon Cat Food
description: Rich in Omega-3 fatty acids for a shiny coat. Grain-free formula for sensitive stomachs.

name: Squeaky Plush Bunny Toy
description: Super soft plush toy with a built-in squeaker. Great for small and medium dogs.

name: Adjustable Cat Collar
description: Soft breakaway collar with reflective stitching for night safety. Fits most cats.

name: Cozy Fleece Pet Blanket
description: Ultra-soft fleece blanket perfect for snuggling. Machine washable and hypoallergenic.

name: Natural Dental Chews
description: Reduces plaque and tartar buildup. Made with natural ingredients, no artificial additives.

name: Retractable Dog Leash
description: Extends up to 16ft with a one-button brake and lock. Ergonomic anti-slip handle.

name: Cat Scratching Post Tower
description: Multi-level scratching tower with sisal rope and cozy perches. Keeps furniture safe.

name: Rope Tug-of-War Toy
description: Durable braided cotton rope for interactive play. Helps clean teeth while playing.

name: Puppy Starter Food Pack
description: Specially formulated for puppies under 12 months. Supports healthy growth and immunity.

name: Reflective Dog Bandana
description: Stylish bandana with reflective strips for safe evening walks. One size fits most dogs.

name: Elevated Dog Feeding Bowl
description: Raised stainless steel bowls reduce neck strain during meals. Non-slip base included.

name: Laser Pointer Cat Toy
description: USB rechargeable laser pointer with 5 interchangeable heads. Hours of fun for cats.

name: Freeze-Dried Raw Cat Treats
description: 100% real meat freeze-dried treats. No preservatives, no fillers — just pure nutrition.

name: Waterproof Dog Raincoat
description: Lightweight waterproof jacket with adjustable velcro straps. Available in sizes XS–XL.

name: Self-Warming Pet Cushion
description: Reflects your pet's own body heat to keep them warm. No electricity needed.

name: Tennis Ball 3-Pack
description: Extra-durable non-toxic tennis balls for fetch. Floats in water, great for outdoor play.
